3. `Tools/rbk/rbgm_cli.sh` — CLI routing for manual procedures

For each file, report the complete contents with line numbers.

282	rbgm_payor_refresh() {
283	  zrbgm_sentinel
284	
285	  buc_doc_brief "Display the manual Payor OAuth credential installation/refresh procedure"
286	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
287	
288	  zrbgm_s1     "Manual Payor OAuth Credential Installation/Refresh Procedure"
289	  zrbgm_d      "Use this for initial credential setup after payor establishment or to refresh expired/compromised credentials."
290	  zrbgm_d      "Testing mode refresh tokens expire after 6 months of non-use."
291	  zrbgm_e
292	  zrbgm_s2     "When to use this procedure:"
293	  zrbgm_d      "  - Initial setup after running rbgm_payor_establish"
294	  zrbgm_d      "  - Payor operations return 401/403 errors"
295	  zrbgm_d      "  - OAuth client secret compromised"
296	  zrbgm_d      "  - 6+ months since last Payor operation"
297	  zrbgm_e
298	  zrbgm_s2     "1. Obtain OAuth Credentials:"
299	  zrbgm_d      "   For initial setup:"
300	  zrbgm_d      "      - Use JSON file downloaded during rbgm_payor_establish"
301	  zrbgm_d      "   For refresh/renewal:"
302	  zrbgm_dld    "      - Go to: " "Credentials for Payor Project" "https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
303	  zrbgm_dm     "      - Find existing " "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME}" " OAuth client"
304	  zrbgm_d      "      - Click the OAuth client name to open details"
305	  zrbgm_d      "      - To rotate secret if compromised:"
306	  zrbgm_dm     "        a. Click " "+ Add secret"
307	  zrbgm_d      "        b. Click the download icon next to the NEW secret"
308	  zrbgm_dm     "           Browser downloads: " "client_secret_[id].apps.googleusercontent.com.json"
309	  zrbgm_dmd    "        c. Click " "Disable" " on the secret with the older creation date"
310	  zrbgm_d      "        d. Click the trash icon to delete that disabled secret"
311	  zrbgm_e
312	  zrbgm_s2     "2. Install/Refresh OAuth Credentials:"
313	  zrbgm_d      "   Run the payor install command with the downloaded JSON:"
314	  zrbgm_dc     "      " "rbgp_payor_install ~/Downloads/client_secret_*.json"
315	  zrbgm_d      "   This will:"
316	  zrbgm_d      "   - Guide you through OAuth authorization flow"
317	  zrbgm_d      "   - Store secure credentials in RBRR_SECRETS_DIR/rbro-payor.env"
318	  zrbgm_d      "   - Update RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID in rbrp.env"
319	  zrbgm_d      "   - Test the authentication"
320	  zrbgm_d      "   - Initialize depot tracking"
321	  zrbgm_d      "   - Reset the 6-month expiration timer"
322	  zrbgm_e
323	  zrbgm_s2     "3. Verify Installation:"
324	  zrbgm_d      "   Test with a simple operation:"
325	  buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_LIST_DEPOT}"
326	  zrbgm_d      "   Should display current depots without authentication errors."
327	  zrbgm_e
328	  zrbgm_d      "Prevention: Run any Payor operation monthly to prevent expiration."
329	
330	  buc_success "OAuth credential installation/refresh procedure displayed"
331	}

413	zrbgm_po_extract_capture() {

418	  local z_line=""
